changes.description: Dramatically condensed SKILL.md from 484 to ~100 lines. Replaced complex html2pptx workflow with direct PptxGenJS usage. Added explicit instruction to include ALL slides (including title slide) in extraction output. Removed design-focused content (color palettes, visual details, layout tips) irrelevant for qwen3-30b.
Added explicit async/await guidance for writeFile() and emphasized it returns a Promise. Added async IIFE pattern example.
Restructured creation workflow into numbered steps (install, write script, RUN SCRIPT, extract text) to prevent model from skipping the script execution step.
Strengthened slides array instruction: explicitly stated title/cover slide must be the first entry with exact count matching slide_count.

notes: Occasional timeouts on pptx-create are due to qwen3-30b stochastically asking confirmation questions instead of proceeding, not skill issues. When the model follows the skill, both tasks achieve 100/100. Removed html2pptx.md (no longer referenced). Kept ooxml.md, scripts/, and ooxml/ directories as they are referenced by SKILL.md.
